arts.ttl: Milan Move Closer to Signing Kyle Walker from Manchester City
arts.sum: AC Milan are making significant strides in their pursuit of Kyle Walker, the experienced right-back currently playing for Manchester City. The Rossoneri have reportedly reached an agreement with Walker on personal terms and are now in the process of finalizing details with City. arts.ttl: Juventus Eye Fikayo Tomori for Defence
arts.sum: Juventus are pursuing a new central defender, with Fikayo Tomori emerging as a primary target following Ronald Araujo's impending contract renewal with Barcelona.
